song.title: Blessed Be
song.lyrics:
[v1] Blessed be, blessed be, blessed be the God and Father Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ
Blessed be, blessed be, blessed be the God and Father Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ [c] Who has blessed us with every blessing In the heavenlies in Christ Who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing In the heavenlies in Christ [v2] Blessed be, blessed be, blessed be the God and Father Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ
